docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOGHADAM, NAVID AS TO DEFENDANT KUMAR, SATYENDRA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MOGHADAM, NAVID AS TO DEFENDANT KUMAR, SATYENDRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-08-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KUMAR, SATYENDRA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF NAVID MOGHADAM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SATYENDRA KUMAR IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $1580 TO THE PLAINTIFF (COSTS INCLUDED). PAYMENT WAS TENDERED IN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
